title: Venetian Spirit Energy Simulation in Little Tokyo
description: A mystical energy simulation set in the LittlestTokyo cityscape where the user channels spirit energy between floating Venetian masks and shadow-casting totems. Energy is conserved across the system: transferring glow to one mask drains another, and shadow totem orientations couple with mask energy levels. Users can undo/redo every action and must balance the system across 10+ interaction steps.
prompt:
Create a single HTML file using Three.js r170 with GLTFLoader and OrbitControls from CDN. Load LittlestTokyo.glb as the environment base, scaled to fit a 20-unit bounding box, with its AnimationMixer playing all clips. Place 4 venice_mask.glb instances floating above the city at cardinal positions (N/S/E/W) at height y=8, each with an emissive glow (colored point light: red, blue, green, gold). Place 3 ShadowmappableMesh.glb instances on rooftops as shadow totems with DirectionalLights casting shadows onto the city (enable renderer.shadowMap, PCFSoftShadowMap). Implement a conserved energy system: total energy = 400 units, distributed among the 4 masks (initially 100 each). Clicking a mask selects it (outline highlight). While selected, a slider appears in an HTML overlay panel showing energy 0-400. Adjusting one mask's energy automatically redistributes the deficit/surplus proportionally among unselected masks, enforcing conservation. Each mask's point light intensity and emissive material intensity scale linearly with its energy. The 3 shadow totems have rotation sliders (0-360 degrees) that couple with mask energy: rotating a totem biases energy flow toward the nearest mask by +10 per 90-degree increment, triggering proportional redistribution. Implement full undo/redo with Ctrl+Z / Ctrl+Y storing snapshots of all energy values and totem rotations in a history stack (max 50 entries). Add a reset button restoring initial state. Display a real-time HUD showing each mask's energy as colored bars and total energy (must always read 400). Camera: PerspectiveCamera at position (15, 12, 15) looking at origin with OrbitControls. Add AmbientLight(0x404040) and HemisphereLight. The interaction flow requires: select masks (4 clicks), adjust energies (4 slider changes), rotate totems (3 rotations), test undo/redo (2+ keypresses) totaling 13+ steps minimum. Use a dark sky background (0x0a0a1a) for atmosphere.

[State Exposure (required)]
Expose window.__3D_STATE__ updated every animation frame:
window.__3D_STATE__ = {
  totalEnergyPool: number,         // total conserved energy across all masks (constant 400)
  maskEnergyRed: number,         // energy units assigned to red mask (0-400)
  maskEnergyBlue: number,         // energy units assigned to blue mask (0-400)
  maskEnergyGreen: number,         // energy units assigned to green mask (0-400)
  maskEnergyGold: number,         // energy units assigned to gold mask (0-400)
  selectedMaskIndex: number,         // index of currently selected mask (-1 if none, 0=red, 1=blue, 2=green, 3=gold)
  totemRotation0: number,         // rotation angle in degrees for shadow totem 0 (0-360)
  totemRotation1: number,         // rotation angle in degrees for shadow totem 1 (0-360)
  totemRotation2: number,         // rotation angle in degrees for shadow totem 2 (0-360)
  cityAnimationActive: boolean,         // whether LittlestTokyo animation mixer is playing
  shadowsEnabled: boolean,         // whether shadow rendering is active
  energyTransferCount: number,         // cumulative count of energy redistribution events
}
